title: [InstCombine][profcheck] Add unknown branch weight to all selects in InstCombineMulDivRem.cpp
author: alanzhao1
description:
These select instructions originate from code without existing branches, so there's no existing branch weight data. Therefore, we add unknown branch weights to all of them.

Tracking issue: #147390

tests.test_body:
declare void @use32(i32)

define i32 @mul_bools_use2(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
  %zx = zext i1 %x to i32
  %zy = zext i1 %y to i32
  call void @use32(i32 %zy)
  %r = mul i32 %zy, %zx
  ret i32 %r
}

define noundef i8 @urem_with_opposite_condition(i8 %x, i8 %n) {
  %cond = icmp ult i8 %x, %n
  br i1 %cond, label %.bb1, label %.bb0

.bb0:                                             ; preds = %0
  %add = add i8 %x, 1
  %out = urem i8 %add, %n
  ret i8 %out

.bb1:                                             ; preds = %0
  ret i8 0
}
